title: xyris acrophila
intro: Xyris acrophila, also known as the Mountain Goldeneye, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Xyris acrophila is often prepared as a decoction or tincture for herbal remedies, and its leaves and roots are commonly used in traditional medicine.
